DECLARATION OF THOMAS S. LAKRITZ IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO BRING TO TRIAL (TRANSACTION ID # 66452930) FILED BY RESPONDENT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-27-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PETITIONER LEDO, TROY W MESA, TED LEMECA PARTNERS, LLC (A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY CORPORATION)
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-09-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR ISSUANCE OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS TO DETERMINE WHETHER MR. LEDO WILL SIGN THE PETITION. AS TO THE ISSUANCE OF THE EXHAUSTION OF ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES, IT APPEARS THAT THERE ARE FACTUAL ISSUES CONCERNING SERVICE AND THE COURT IS UNABLE TO DETERMINE IF THE PERSON COMPLETING EXHIBIT I IS A REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER ENTITLED TO THE PRESUMPTION IN E.C. SECTION 647. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THIS IS NOT A BASIS FOR DEMURRER. COURT ORDERS THE LAST PORTION OF ITS TENTATIVE RULING STRICKEN STARTING WITH THE PHRASE: "THE DECISION IN ANDERSON. . .". MR. LAKRITZ IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
ORDER SUSTAINING RESPONDENT'S DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
PETITION (AMENDED) FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER LEDO, TROY W MESA, TED LEMECA PARTNERS, LLC (A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY CORPORATION)

NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF LAKRITZ, THOMAS S ON OCT-09-2007 THROUGH OCT-15-2007 FILED BY RESPONDENT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-27-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO BRING TO TRIAL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial.
